# ERP Shell Desktop Tauri

Template ID: erp-shell-desktop-tauri
Status: draft
Purpose: Mac and Windows desktop companion for local ERP document intake,
extraction queue review, local runtime status, and sync readiness.
Framework: Tauri + Svelte + Rust
Check: pnpm check:spec
Roadmap: docs/roadmap.md

Use this template when a project needs local files, local model/OCR runtime
control, or batch import into a generated ERP Shell app.

Local extraction:
- Rust owns OCR/model commands; Svelte only invokes Tauri commands and renders
  drafts.
- `runtime_settings` and `save_runtime_settings` persist the selected Gemma
  model and OCR language in local SQLite.
- `install_gemma_model` runs an explicit Ollama pull for the selected model only
  after the user clicks install.
- `extract_document` converts queued scanned images through local Tesseract
  when installed, then falls back to Gemma vision when the selected Ollama model
  is installed.
- `document_draft` reads the persisted local extraction draft.
- Gemma text normalization and image extraction follow the `ai-gateway` Ollama
  adapter pattern and use `MICROSERVICES_DESKTOP_GEMMA_MODEL` for the local
  model name.
- Draft JSON follows the `document-extraction` module shape: schemaId,
  targetType, fields, tables, rawText, summary, confidence, runtime, model, and
  warnings.
- Do not silently download OCR data, model weights, or call remote providers.

Do not treat it as a standalone offline ERP. The MVP only creates local drafts
and sync status. Approved business records still belong in the Cloudflare ERP
backend.
